what_was_done: Implemented 5 of 6 framework upgrades from AKIRA comparison analysis. A: Fixed noise filter false-positive bug (anchored regex + 85-char length exemption + force bypass). B: Added tag normalization (_normalize_tags auto-corrects bare tags to dimensioned format). C: New mentor_analytics.py with per-trigger cooldowns (15-20min) and periodic checkpoint every 50 tool calls. E: Added analytics MCP calls to /benchmark skill. F: Extended Gate 6 with analytics advisory (separate counter, threshold 15, resets on any mcp__analytics__ call). D (boot integration) intentionally skipped. Tests: 1413 -> 1428 (+15 new). 3 commits on Self-Sprint-2.
